title: Oguri Cap Totem
description: Transform your Totem of Undying into Oguri Cap from Umamusume!
body:

## Oguri Cap Totem

This Resource Pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a cute little Oguri Cap model. This is it.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f4d123e4f94474c035bb04fd053ac599302d34.png)
